hero.description: Upload a reference poster or pick from templates crafted by pro designers. AI takes inspiration from their design to generate your personalized poster.
hero.imageAlt: African designer assisted by an AI robot

testimonials.quote: Designers create, AI automates. On Graphiste GPT, designers focus on creativity and submit their best work. AI personalizes these designs for clients. Designers earn royalties, clients save time. Everyone wins.

marquee.youtubeDesc: Captivating YouTube thumbnails that boost your views and engagement
marquee.postersDesc: Hundreds of professional designs created by our partner designers

templates.description: Designs created by our partner designers. Pick one, customize it, and AI generates your poster. Each use rewards the designer.
templates.empty: No template found for this domain.

showcase.descLive: Professional posters generated in seconds. These visuals were created by our users with AI.
showcase.descFallback: Discover a selection of inspiring visuals while validated showcase creations are being published.
showcase.empty: Professional posters generated in seconds. Visuals created by our users will appear here.
showcase.emptyHint: Be the first to create a poster and it will appear here! ✨

process.description: From idea to professional poster in 4 simple steps. AI does the work, you reap the results.

steps.s1Desc: Explain what you want to create: event, promotion, concert, training...
steps.s2Desc: Choose from designs by pro designers or upload your own reference.
steps.s3Desc: Our AI takes inspiration from the chosen style to create your custom visual in seconds.
steps.s4Desc: Get your HD poster ready to print or share on social networks.

about.description: Graphiste GPT reinvents graphic creation. Users get professional posters instantly. Designers focus on what they do best: creativity. AI handles the repetitive work. Every template used generates royalties for its creator.

features.description: A platform where users create posters in seconds, and designers monetize their creativity.

services.s1Desc: Create your posters in a few clicks with AI. Upload a reference or pick a template, AI does the rest.
services.s2Desc: Submit your designs and earn royalties on every use. Focus on creativity, AI automates the rest.
services.s3Desc: Professional designs for every sector: church, restaurant, event, training, e-commerce and more.

list.f1Desc: Describe your project in plain language, our AI understands your needs.
list.f2Desc: Customize your visual colors with our smart picker.
list.f3Desc: Over 50 professional templates tailored to every industry.
list.f4Desc: Upload reference images to guide the creation.
list.f5Desc: Get your visuals in seconds with our optimized AI.
list.f6Desc: Find all your creations in your personal space.
list.f7Desc: Download your creations in high definition, ready to print.
list.f8Desc: Our AI learns from your preferences for ever better results.

pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free and scale with your growth.
pricing.creditsDescB: , regardless of the resolution chosen. Modifications are always free.

contact.description: A question? A special project? Our team is here to help you.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project or ask your question...
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Error while sending. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.

cta.description: Upload a reference or pick a template. AI does the rest in seconds.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions

items.a1: Graphiste GPT combines professional designers' expertise with AI to generate custom posters in seconds.
items.q2: How much does generating a poster cost?
items.a2: Each poster uses 2 credits. Free users get 3 free generations, then paid plans start at 2,500 FCFA/month.
items.a3: Yes, every image generated on your account belongs to you and can be used without restrictions.
items.q4: How do I become a partner designer?
items.a4: Register as a partner designer, submit your templates and earn royalties on every use.

footer.tagline: The platform where designers create templates and earn royalties. AI generates your personalized posters in seconds.
